sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Current state: crosses at pos 3 (col 30) and pos 4 (col 36) in top panel
# Bottom panel: crosses at col 42 (2 of them)
# 
# Let me try clicking pos 3 to see where highlights appear
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 19, 'col': 30}])

seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("After clicking pos 3:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ('N', 'G', 'g'):
        boundary = n['boundary']
        cols = [p[1] for p in boundary]
        rows = [p[0] for p in boundary]
        center_col = sum(cols) // len(cols)
        center_row = sum(rows) // len(rows)
        print(f"  {n['color']}: center=({center_row}, {center_col}), pixels={n['pixels']}")

# Now click the highlight to move the cross
g_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'g']
if g_nodes:
    all_g_cols = []
    all_g_rows = []
    for n in g_nodes:
        for p in n['boundary']:
            all_g_cols.append(p[1])
            all_g_rows.append(p[0])
    highlight_col = sum(all_g_cols) // len(all_g_cols)
    highlight_row = sum(all_g_rows) // len(all_g_rows)
    print(f"\nClicking highlight at ({highlight_row}, {highlight_col})")
    action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': highlight_row, 'col': highlight_col}])
    
    seg2 = current_frame.segmentation
    print("\nAfter moving cross:")
    for n in seg2['nodes']:
        if n['color'] == 'N':
            boundary = n['boundary']
            cols = [p[1] for p in boundary]
            rows = [p[0] for p in boundary]
            center_col = sum(cols) // len(cols)
            center_row = sum(rows) // len(rows)
            print(f"  N: center=({center_row}, {center_col})")
    print(f"Result: {last_action_result}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
